title: KuCoin WebSocket adapter

context_files.reason: Pure functions and immutability for data transformation

acceptance_criteria: Connects to KuCoin WebSocket using bullet token flow
Subscribes to ticker, trades, orderbook (L2), and candles topics
Reconnects automatically on disconnect with backoff
Emits typed events: TickerUpdate, TradeUpdate, OrderbookUpdate, CandleUpdate

contracts.name: MarketDataProvider
contracts.description: Abstract interface for market data providers
